title: Build live chat and notification transport on top of REST plus WebSocket
summary: Implement agent chat, live session streaming, and in-app notifications using the existing Sloppy REST and WebSocket routes.
deliverables: network actors for REST and WS
acceptance_criteria: User can open an agent chat and send a message
Assistant responses stream over WS and recover after disconnect
Notifications arrive over the global notifications socket
Reconnect path resyncs stale state through REST
